auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account or try a demo
auth.loginRedirectHint: Sign in to continue. You will be redirected to the requested page after login.
auth.registerSubtitle: One step away from exploring Istanbul routes.
auth.roleTouristDesc: Discover routes, pick verified guides, get offers
auth.roleGuideDesc: Badge verification, sell routes, manage offers
auth.registerLegal: By signing up you accept the
auth.sessionNote: When you sign in, a JWT is stored on your device until you log out. Use HTTPS and strong passwords in production.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Guide verification, route moderation, and content reports.
admin.forbidden: This page is for platform administrators only.

guide.panelForbidden: This area is for guide role only.
guide.panelSignup: Register as a guide and sell your routes.

profile.title: Profile
profile.lookTabHint: Go to the Appearance tab for theme and font.
profile.lookTabHintEn: For theme and font, open the {tab} tab.
profile.lookTabHintTr: For theme and font, open the {tab} tab.
profile.notesEmpty: No notes yet. Add one below or save from a route detail page.
profile.xpHowDesc: XP is both level and shop currency. Actions below are processed automatically.
profile.rewardShopDesc: Coupons and discounts apply at checkout with a code. Owned rewards are listed on your profile.
profile.rewardActive: Active · payment code on your profile
profile.leaderboardHint: Top XP earners get reward badges.
profile.lookCustomizeDesc: Each theme tells a different Istanbul story: background, menu, cards, buttons and font change together. Applied instantly.

purchases.title: My purchases
purchases.subtitle: Downloadable route packages and payment status

cities.title: Historial-GO
cities.subtitle: Discover the beauty of Turkey
cities.loadError: City list could not be loaded.

planner.title: Route planner
planner.subtitle: Add trips to your calendar with date and time.

onboarding.cityHint: We will tailor routes to this city
onboarding.durationTitle: How much time do you have?
onboarding.interestsHint: Pick at least 2 · AI suggestions are shaped accordingly
onboarding.budgetHint: Daily trip budget (transport, food, museum tickets included)
onboarding.noMatch: No custom match for this city yet; browse all routes in discover.
onboarding.slowHint: Recommendations took a while. They will appear here when ready; you can go to discover meanwhile.
onboarding.noRoutesWarning: No routes for {city} yet. Browse other cities from discover.
onboarding.errorContinue: {error} You can still continue with "Explore {city} routes".

routeDetail.offlineSaved: Offline package saved to your device. Use it offline from the audio page.
routeDetail.metaDesc: {city} — {minutes}-minute walking route, {stops} stops. Explore with audio guide and map.
routeDetail.noStops: No stops recorded for this route.

guides.title: Verified guides
guides.subtitle: Early-stage platform where guides can create digital route content. Only badge-verified guides are listed.
guides.empty: No verified guides yet. For demo, the guide@example.com account is verified.

activeRoute.planHint: Stops you add are private to you; the original route does not change.
activeRoute.loginRequired: You must sign in for this action.
activeRoute.startFirst: Start a route first (route detail → Start route).
activeRoute.purchaseRequired: You must purchase this route or pick a free route.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The route you are looking for might be on another street.

trips.title: My requests
trips.loginRequired: Sign in to create a request or submit an offer.
trips.betaBody: This section is open for development. Guide verification, secure payments, and in-app offer acceptance are being expanded. Verified guides submit offers; payments are processed with platform protection.
trips.touristDesc: Guides send offers for your route or custom trip request; accept and pay in the app.
trips.guideDesc: As a verified guide, submit offers on open requests. Group discounts apply automatically.
trips.offerTemplate: Hello, here is my offer for {title}.

map.title: Live map
map.subtitle: Live pins via Google Places. Pick a category; radius expands if no results.
map.geofenceHint: Geofence active (~20 m) — audio narration when you arrive at a stop.
map.mapPickHint: Tap the map where you want to add a stop.
map.geoUnsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
map.geoHint: You can still use the map without location. Browse by city or pick places from the list.
map.foodPickHint: When adding a meal stop, pick from the list — nothing is added automatically.
map.noLivePins: No live Google pins for {city}. Showing places from the database on the map.

discover.offlineDemo: Cannot reach server — showing sample routes.
discover.offlineDemoHint: Refresh when back online, or continue from the Cities tab.
discover.aiWizardHint: Match score combines budget fit, duration, and proximity.
discover.aiLimit: Daily AI limit reached on the free plan. Go Premium for unlimited use.
discover.noCityRoutesDesc: Create a personal route with AI or explore places from the cities tab.

district.pickCategoryHint: Pick sightseeing, dining, or accommodation to see places.

city.noDistricts: District list could not be loaded for this city.

route.step1Hint: Use your location or pick a start point on the map.
route.step2Hint: Add an extra stop along the way if you like.
route.step3Hint: Choose walk or drive, then calculate the route.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Recommendations and mini plans by city, district and interests

errors.network: Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.recommendations: We cannot load route recommendations right now.

guideRoutes.createdBanner: Route saved as draft. You can submit it for review.
guideRoutes.profileNotFound: Guide profile not found. Sign out and sign in again as a guide.
guideRoutes.serverUnreachable: Cannot reach server ({url}). Is the API running?
guideRoutes.workflowHint: Draft → submit for review → admin approval → publish

social.notesPrivate: Only you can see these notes.

checkout.title: Secure checkout
checkout.demoNote: No real charge in this environment; a test record is created only.
checkout.cardLast4Error: Enter the last 4 digits of the card number.
checkout.secureHint: Your payment is processed over a secure connection.

tripNew.touristOnly: Trip requests are for tourist accounts only.
tripNew.title: Create trip request
tripNew.subtitle: Describe your route; verified guides send price offers for this plan.
tripNew.groupDiscount: 10+ people: 10% group discount on guide offers · 20+ people: 15%
tripNew.customHint: Switch to “My own route” tab for extra stops if you like.
tripNew.minStops: Pick at least 2 stops for a custom route.
tripNew.pickCatalog: Pick a catalog route or create a custom route.
tripNew.prefillMessage: I want to explore this route ({city}) with a guide.
tripNew.prefillGuide: I would also like an offer from guide {name}.
tripNew.inactiveBody: This form is a preview. Guide verification and secure payments are being built. You can explore routes and the map; publishing requests will open soon.

routeBuilder.title: Build your route
routeBuilder.hint: Pick at least 2 stops. Guides will send offers for this itinerary.

premium.title: Go Premium
premium.subtitle: No payment integration — request admin approval with Request.
premium.feature2: Richer discovery filters and faster recommendations.
premium.feature3: Offline packs and advanced features (coming soon).
premium.pending: Your request is under admin review. It will appear here when approved.
premium.loginRequired: Sign in to submit a request.
premium.requestReceived: Request received. Premium will activate after admin approval.

authForgot.title: Forgot password
authForgot.hint: If your email is registered, a reset link will be sent. It may take a few minutes; check spam/junk.

authReset.title: New password
authReset.invalidLink: Invalid link. Request a new password reset.

cityDetail.districtLoadError: District list could not be loaded from API; trying local list…
cityDetail.noDistricts: District list could not be loaded for this city. Please refresh shortly.
cityDetail.categoryHint: Use the category buttons above to search city-wide without picking a district.

mapRegion.fallbackHint: Map data unavailable right now; you can still pick places from the list.
mapRegion.osmHint: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY for Google Maps; showing OSM for now.

landing.heroSubtitle: Smart onboarding, live map, audio guide and verified guides — all in one app.
landing.featureOnboardingDesc: Pick history, art, gastronomy — build your profile in seconds.
landing.featureAiDesc: Surfaces the best routes for your time, budget and interests.
landing.featureMapDesc: Real stop coordinates, location tracking and route progress.
landing.featureAudioDesc: TR / EN / DE TTS; stop narrations and offline playback.
landing.featureGamificationDesc: XP, badges, streaks and weekly leaderboard.
landing.featureGuidesDesc: Verified guides create digital routes; early marketplace.

legal.termsIntro: By registering or visiting Historial-GO you accept these terms. The platform is an early-stage tourism app where guides can create digital route content.
legal.termsScope1: City and place discovery, AI route suggestions, audio narration
legal.termsScope2: Purchase of digital routes created by guides (demo or Stripe)
legal.termsScope3: Trip requests and offers from verified guides
legal.termsUserBody: Keep your account credentials private. Purchased content is for personal use only; unauthorized sharing and resale are prohibited. Misleading reviews or malicious content are not allowed.
legal.termsGuideBody: Guide accounts require badge verification. Unverified guides cannot display the "verified" badge. Details:
legal.termsPaymentBody: Prices are shown in TRY. Platform commission is stated in the payment summary.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: Historical information comes from guides and AI; errors are possible. For live guiding, the contract is between traveler and guide. The platform acts as an intermediary.
legal.privacyIntro: Historial-GO processes personal data in line with KVKK and GDPR principles.
legal.aboutIntro: Historial-GO is an early-access tourism platform combining AI routes, live maps, audio guides and verified guide content.
legal.contactIntro: For support, partnerships or guide verification questions, reach us by email.
legal.refundIntro: Digital route purchases can be refunded within 14 days if the content was not substantially used.
legal.cookiesIntro: We use essential cookies for login and preferences, and analytics cookies only with consent.
legal.kvkkIntro: This notice explains how your personal data is processed under Turkish Law No. 6698.
legal.paymentSecurityIntro: Card data is processed by Stripe or demo checkout; we do not store full card numbers.
legal.guideTrustIntro: Verified guides submit license and education documents. Admin review is required before the badge is shown.

guideForm.guideOnly: This page is for guide accounts only.
guideForm.createSubtitle: Saved as draft; add stops in order, then submit for review.
guideForm.sessionError: Session may have expired. Sign out and sign in again.
guideForm.editSubtitle: Update stops, reorder them or add new places.
guideForm.notEditable: This route cannot be edited right now (published or under review). Only drafts or routes with change requests can be edited.
guideForm.stopsHint: Pick from catalog or add manually. Reorder with up/down; click the map to set location.
guideForm.pickCityHint: Pick the city from the list for better map and place search.
guideForm.noPlacesFound: No matching places in this city; you can add stops manually.
guideForm.mapUpdateHint: Click the map to update the selected stop location.
guideForm.mapAddHint: Click the map to add a new stop.

faq.a1: A culture travel platform with personalized historic routes, map stops and multilingual audio guides.
faq.a2: Guides submit routes for review; after admin approval the guide can publish.
faq.a3: Production uses Stripe Checkout. Demo mode does not charge real fees.
faq.a4: See our refund policy page for digital content conditions.

guideVerify.guideOnly: This page is for guide accounts only.
guideVerify.title: Guide verification
guideVerify.subtitle: Submit your license and documents for the verified badge.
guideVerify.intro: Enter your badge / license details under Turkish Tourist Guidance Law No. 6326. Only verified accounts are listed to tourists.
guideVerify.ministryLink: Ministry of Culture and Tourism — tourist guide legislation
guideVerify.fileHint: Max 8 MB · PDF, JPG or PNG
guideVerify.verifiedBody: Tourists can see you in the guide list.
guideVerify.underReviewBody: Your documents are being checked by the platform team. Your profile will go live after approval.
